possible_dialog: *grunt* Sure, my lawn could use a trim today.
reject_dialog: *grunt* My lawn doesn't need to be mowed today.
*grunt* What do you want? I don't need anything today.
*grunt* I'm watching the football game right now, scram.
unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
The weeds in the front lawn are glaring at you.
first_dialog: *grunt* What do you want? Make it quick, I need to go back to clearing weeds in my backyard - they're so tough these days...
*grunt* Oh - well that was actually what I was working on just before you came and bothered me.
*grunt* Those weeds did a number on me, they'd probably eat you alive.
*grunt* Mr. Big Shot here, huh? Well you know what, I don't care anymore, those weeds... I think they're putting something in the water to make them so... ugh... thinking about that thing...

*grunt* Ugh, well I need a break anyway. If you can take on my lawn then you'll have my respect. Heck, you can even burn down half my lawn and I'll still pay you - anything to get rid of... that monster...
Well good luck kid. You're going to need it. I'm going to get myself another can of soda and go watch football.
player_dialog: Hi, I'm here to mow your lawn!
So... would you like some help?
